NHL Scoreboard

Source: R/nhl_scoreboard.R
nhl_scoreboard.Rd

Returns the current league-wide scoreboard with today's games.

Usage

nhl_scoreboard()

Value

Returns a list with scoreboard data (focusedDate, games by date).

Examples

# \donttest{
  try(nhl_scoreboard())
#> $focusedDate
#> [1] "2026-04-06"
#> 
#> $focusedDateCount
#> [1] 11
#> 
#> $gamesByDate
#>          date
#> 1  2026-04-03
#> 2  2026-04-04
#> 3  2026-04-05
#> 4  2026-04-06
#> 5  2026-04-07
#> 6  2026-04-08
#> 7  2026-04-09
#> 8  2026-04-11
#> 9  2026-04-12
#> 10 2026-04-13
#> 11 2026-04-14
#>
